content.text: This Privacy Policy describes how Noou (the "Company") collects and processes the personal data of users interested in monitoring the development and launch of the Noou platform (dedicated to design agents, prompt libraries, and templates) during its pre-launch phase.

sections.subtitle: 1.1. Data Controller
sections.text: Noou is the controller of the personal data collected under this Policy.

sections.subtitle: 1.2. Scope
sections.text: This Policy is strictly limited to the collection and processing of a single piece of personal data: the User's electronic mail address (e-mail). No other personal data is collected in this phase.

content.title: 2. Legal Basis and Purpose of Processing

sections.subtitle: 2.1. Legal Basis
sections.text: The processing of the User's e-mail is based solely on the User's Consent, provided when the e-mail is submitted through the registration form, in compliance with the Brazilian General Data Protection Law (LGPD) and international best practices.

sections.subtitle: 2.2. Specific Purpose
sections.text: The collected e-mail address will be used for the exclusive purpose of direct communication regarding the Noou platform, including:
list: Status updates, technical advancements, and development timelines.
Official announcements concerning the launch date and platform availability.
Newsletters and updates strictly related to Noou's features and resources.

sections.subtitle: 3.1. Non-Sharing Policy
sections.text: The collected e-mail address will not be sold, rented, leased, or shared with external third parties for commercial, marketing, or advertising purposes unrelated to the communications specified in Section 2.2.

sections.subtitle: 3.2. Data Security
sections.text: Noou implements appropriate administrative, technical, and physical safeguards to protect the e-mail address against unauthorized access, destruction, loss, alteration, or any form of unlawful processing.
The User, as the data subject, may exercise the following rights concerning their e-mail address at any time:
list: Right to Withdrawal of Consent (Opt-Out): The User has the right to revoke consent and stop receiving communications. This can be executed immediately via the automatic "unsubscribe" link provided in every e-mail communication.
Right of Access and Confirmation: The right to obtain confirmation as to whether their data is being processed, and access to that data.
Right to Erasure (Exclusion): The right to request the permanent erasure of their e-mail address from our pre-launch database.
Right to Correction/Rectification: The right to have incomplete, inaccurate, or outdated data corrected.

sections.text: To exercise rights under Section 4.1 (excluding the automatic opt-out), the User must contact the Data Controller using the contact information provided in Section 6.
This Privacy Policy is specific to the pre-launch phase. A comprehensive, detailed Privacy Policy and Terms of Use will be made available upon the official launch and operation of the Noou Platform.
For any questions, concerns, or to exercise your rights under this Policy, please contact us at:

questions.question: How do I create my first AI agent?
questions.answer: Navigate to the Agents page, click "Create Agent", choose a template or start from scratch, customize the settings, and click "Save".

questions.question: What are Prompts and how do I use them?
questions.answer: Prompts are pre-built templates that help you get the best results from AI. Browse the Prompt Library, select one that fits your needs, and customize it for your specific use case.

questions.question: How can I train an agent with my own data?
questions.answer: Go to the Context page, upload your files (PDFs, docs, etc.), organize them by category, and assign them to specific agents in the agent settings.

questions.question: What payment methods do you accept?
questions.answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), PayPal, and bank transfers for enterprise plans.

questions.question: How do I upgrade my plan?
questions.answer: Go to Settings > Billing, choose your desired plan, and follow the payment process. Your upgrade will be immediate.

questions.question: Is my data secure?
questions.answer: Yes! We use enterprise-grade encryption, secure cloud storage, and follow strict data privacy regulations. Your data is never shared with third parties.

questions.question: Can I export my conversation history?
questions.answer: Yes, you can export all conversations in JSON or CSV format from the agent chat settings.

questions.question: What languages do the AI agents support?
questions.answer: Our AI agents support over 50 languages including English, Portuguese, Spanish, French, German, Chinese, Japanese, and more.
